AddAclRule.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
AddAclRule.aclRules.protocol: Protocol, including all, tcp, udp, icmp
AddAclRule.aclRules.position: Priority, range 1-32768, must not duplicate existing entries. Lower value means higher priority; rules are matched in descending priority order
AddAclRule.aclRules.direction: Direction of the rule: ingress for inbound, egress for outbound
AddAclRule.aclRules.ipVersion: Defaults to 4. If adding an IPv6 rule, this value must be set to 6. Required.
